utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details (including costs).
- health_coverage: Provided with plan name, cost (€200/month), description. Includes costs -> Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Provided with plan name, cost (€60/month), description. Includes costs -> Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Provided with plan name, cost (€115/month), description, plus optional add-on with cost (€80/month). Includes costs -> Fully specified.
- additional_services: Mentions the Adventure Travel Coverage add-on but does not include costs here; however, the costs for the add-on are specified under travel_coverage. The item asks for any enhancement services with costs. Since the additional service is listed but its cost is not repeated in this field, it is arguably incomplete if we require costs to be present within this item itself. Given the specification "any enhancement services with costs," the cost should be included here; it is missing. -> Not fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides monthly breakdown for without and with add-on (€375/month and €455/month). It asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Annual costs are not provided, only monthly. Therefore not fully specified.
Thus, 3 items are fully specified (health, property, travel), and 2 are not (additional_services, total_budget).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: PrimeCare Premium Plan for health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property, PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel, and an optional Adventure Travel Coverage add-on. I located each of these in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their exact ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan under primary health (rating 3), InsurePlus Standard Coverage under home content (rating 10), PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel insurance (rating 3), and Adventure Travel Coverage under travel enhancement services (rating 10).
